title: Intel Q1 2026 Earnings: AI Chip Momentum
text: Intel Q1 2026 revenue $13.58 billion (beat $12.42B estimates), adjusted EPS 29 cents (beat 1 cent estimate). Q2 2026 forecast revenue $13.8-14.8 billion, EPS $0.08, non-GAAP EPS $0.20 (above expectations of $13.07B revenue, 9 cents EPS). Data centre and AI segment revenue $5.1 billion (vs $4.41B estimates). Strongest growth in data center business gaining traction in AI with surging CPU demand. Intel expanded AI CPU partnership with Google, joined Musk's Terafab AI chip complex with SpaceX and Tesla for robotics and data centre processors. Stock surged 15%, adding $49 billion market value, extending 81% rebound YTD.
